trigger_email_summary: A fictional collector demands a response about a disputed telecom balance before a short deadline but does not provide an itemized account history.

timeline_events.summary: Synthetic telecom service was cancelled, but a final balance continued to appear. Redaction warning: real account records must not be stored.
Demo user disputed the balance and requested an itemized reconciliation.
Synthetic collector requested payment or response but did not attach proof of the balance.

extracted_deadlines.action_required: Send proof request and dispute hold notice.

evidence_matrix.why_it_matters: Needed to prove the claimed balance.
Would show whether charges after cancellation are valid.

missing_evidence: Proof that the collector is authorized to act
Written hold confirmation while the dispute is investigated
recommended_next_action: Draft a proof request, dispute the collection deadline, and ask for written confirmation that collection activity is paused pending reconciliation.
draft_reply_outline: State that the balance is disputed.
Request itemized statement and authority to collect.
Ask for hold confirmation until evidence is supplied.
Reserve escalation if the deadline is enforced without proof.

telegram_card_preview.title: DP-DEBT-001: Collector deadline without proof
telegram_card_preview.body: High priority. Deadline 2026-07-25. Recommended: send proof request and dispute hold notice.

redaction_required.warning: Replace any real account numbers, collector references, statements, phone numbers, names, and exact email text with synthetic placeholders.
